payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please clarify what you want remembered before I can suggest a durable memory action.
repair_options: Specify the exact fact, preference, or event from yesterday that you want remembered.
Provide enough context to identify the item, such as the topic, person, project, or conversation.
If this refers to an existing memory, quote or summarize the memory you mean so it can be reviewed.
If you are unsure, provide several possibilities and choose whether to keep one or multiple separate memories.
